title: verbascum × inexspectatum
intro: Verbascum × inexspectatum, also known as the hybrid mullein, is a cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis, two species of plants in the mullein family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × inexspectatum include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the leaves and flowers often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and calmness.
